hero.title: Excellence at the Service of Your Smile
hero.subtitle: Laboratory Specialized in Aesthetics and Implantology — Over 30 Years of Expertise Serving Dental Professionals

about.sectionSubtitle: Our story, our passion, our commitment

history.title: Dr. Casteran Olivier
history.description:
My professional journey has led me to numerous experiences across France and internationally, as well as the creation of structures ranging from 15 to 120 employees.

I possess an in-depth understanding of the demands of our activities, and the necessary close collaboration between the Dental clinic and the laboratory.

Over my 30 years of professional practice, into which I have invested heavily and achieved much my experience, my expertise, and my choices led me to create DentCare Consultation in 2017 to meet the precise needs of dental practices.

To achieve this, I rely on two production sites: Hanoi (Vietnam) and Bordeaux (France).

Supporting your clinic daily in all prosthetic projects; our availability, attentiveness, communication, and proximity are our greatest assets.

We have strictly mastered the digital workflow: intraoral scanning, 3D printing, zirconia milling, and implantology.

We have the knowledge and expertise for full arch reconstructions, smile design, veneers, onlays, and zirconia.

My teams and I are fully invested and committed to quality, adhering strictly to working procedures and protocols. The Hanoi laboratory is ISO 13485 certified.

My ambition is to deliver excellent work at a reasonable cost.

method.title: Working Method
method.description: Complete mastery of the digital workflow: intraoral scanner, 3D printing, Zirconia milling, and implantology. Every step is controlled to guarantee absolute precision and results that exceed your expectations.
